creator: freebsd@simweb.ch
text:
Hi Veniamin

I eventually forgot to upload the diff in here - excuse. If you find the time to look at it I'm happy to fix things in it. I haven't received other feedback on reviews.freebsd.org but forgot a bit about it, so here it is.

Let me know what needs to be done to have this patch landing in the ports tree :-)


Cheers,
Mathieu
